package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerIoOperationsReadallOnKnownLargeFile() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_io_operations_readall_on_known_large_file"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: I/O operations. Flag os.ReadFile or io.ReadAll on files that are processed sequentially."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
